ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique alphanumeric code for each product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of producing the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sale */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales team that made the sale */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales team member who made the sale */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the sale */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale (units_sold * price) */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used for the sale */,
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate used to convert the sale amount to a standard currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES sales_team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_exchange_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the promotion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the promotion record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the team belongs to */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales team member */,
  "member_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the member */,
  "member_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the member */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the member record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the member record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_members_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being analyzed */,
  "sales_data" TEXT /* Sales data for the product */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the analytics report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales team member, executive) */,
  "user_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_from" TEXT /* Currency from which the exchange rate is applied */,
  "currency_to" TEXT /* Currency to which the exchange rate is applied */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the exchange rate is effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange rate record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_from FOREIGN KEY ("currency_from") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_to FOREIGN KEY ("currency_to") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the currency */,
  "currency_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the currency record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record modified */,
  "modified_field" TEXT /* Name of the field modified */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the modification */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
